articles.title: Red Sox broadcaster Joe Castiglione treated for cancer, will return to booth this summer
articles.description:

articles.title: Garrett Crochet, Red Sox pounded by Minnesota 13-6
articles.description:
Crochet allowed 11 runs — 10 earned — on nine hits and three walks in 1 2/3 innings, the shortest start of his career.

articles.title: Shorthanded Celtics’ wild win over Magic showcased their most impressive quality
